title: Jenkins security advisory (AV26-629)
description: On June 24, 2026, Jenkins published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: External Workspace Manager Plugin  versions prior to 1.3.2
OWASP ZAP Plugin  versions prior to 1.0.7
Script Security Plugin  versions prior to 1402.v94c9ce464861
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
